name: Dogfood Fixes - Landing Page
description: Fix 7 issues found during dogfood QA session on the landing page and registration form

stories.title: Update outdated tryout dates
stories.description: Tryout Info section shows Jan 2026 dates that have already passed. Update dates in landing-data.ts constants and hero badge text to reflect current/upcoming dates.

stories.title: Fix LCP image missing priority and filename with space
stories.description: Console warning: Logo image detected as LCP but header already has priority. This was a false positive — header Image already has priority prop.

stories.title: Fix scroll container position warning
stories.description: Console warning about container missing non-static position for scroll offset calculation. Added position:relative to main container.

stories.title: Fix sidebar navigation overlapping footer
stories.description: Right-side ScrollProgress dots overlap footer content. Hide sidebar when user reaches bottom, lower z-index to z-40.

stories.title: Add Privacy Policy and Terms links to landing page footer
stories.description: The form page footer has legal links but the landing page footer does not. Added for consistency.

stories.title: Fix team tabs overlapping navbar on scroll
stories.description: Investigation showed the apparent overlap was from agent-browser annotation overlay, not actual UI. Navbar z-50 already above section z-10. No code change needed.
